Looks super interesting @morpheus01, congrats on the launch 🎉 How are you selecting the first influencers/creators you're working with?

Great to see more "real-life" use-cases in web3, but not yet another defi platform. Good luck with the launch!

Coinflix

@igor\_krasnik1 thank you 👏🏻

Report

Maria

Oh my! \\_\ Sooo amaaziiing! \\_\ Congratulations on such an idea, and congrats for the wish and will to develop it and give it to the community! ^\_\_^ I am sooo looking forward to jumping into the crew of users! \\_\

Report

Karl Hibbert

Wonderful 2022 concept.. execution and roll-out was spectacular! Personally love the crypto touch and engagement with popular internet creators!

Report [...] shift in our society. It offers a new form of content for creators + influencers (shows, films, etc in the gap between Youtube/Tik Tok + Netflix), but the platform itself is owned by the creators and users through a token. In addition, it offers a funding pathway to creators wherein the community (through a DAO) decides what gets funding rather than film execs. So I present two options to you. You can take the blue pill, and return to the land of being monetized, harvested, datatized, milked, drained, and used by existing systems. Or you take the red pill - you stay in wonderland, and I show you how deep the rabbit hole goes. Morpheus [...] Subscribe

Coinflix

## Creator-made shows. Community owned Web3 platform

12 followers

## Creator-made shows. Community owned Web3 platform

12 followers

Visit website

DAOs

•

Defi

Coinflix is a people-owned platform & DAO for streaming & funding film & videos from top creators. Community decides what gets funded, then has the potential to share in the upside; with a token powering the ecosystem and acting as equity in the company.
